messages.text:
Project Sojo is an agentic platform designed to shift the digital workspace from a conversation-centric model to a **work-centric architecture**. Rather than fragmenting work across scattered chats, threads, and runs, Sojo establishes the **Task** as its core primitive—a durable, living source of truth that tracks goals, states, plans, and progress [📄 Task as a primitive in Sojo](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1c3NpVR1Mw91m3pT6NQv27aLRXBDqs0Ca2Sh2N3mT_c4).

### Core Philosophy & Architecture
* **Tasks over Sessions:** While sessions (chats, emails, or mobile interactions) act as temporary windows for dialogue, the Task itself holds the structured, durable state of work [📄 Task as a primitive in Sojo](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1c3NpVR1Mw91m3pT6NQv27aLRXBDqs0Ca2Sh2N3mT_c4).
* **Structured Handoffs:** Instead of sharing unstructured history, tasks communicate using "handoffs"—focused summaries containing goals, decisions, key artifacts, and next steps [📄 Task as a primitive in Sojo](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1c3NpVR1Mw91m3pT6NQv27aLRXBDqs0Ca2Sh2N3mT_c4).
* **Role-Based Agents (A2):** Autonomous, role-based agents coordinate the work end-to-end, deciding when to parallelize, continue in place, or merge tasks across various channels (like Studio, Gmail, and WhatsApp) [📄 Task as a primitive in Sojo](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1c3NpVR1Mw91m3pT6NQv27aLRXBDqs0Ca2Sh2N3mT_c4).

### Ecosystem & Entry Points
The team is developing complementary, highly focused tools to drive adoption. For instance, **Orchestra** (an opinionated marketing-task prototype built on the Jet Ski platform) is being positioned as a mobile-friendly "Trojan horse" to seamlessly bring small business users into the broader Sojo ecosystem [📄 Business in a Box Weekly - 2026/05/13 12:02 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1gQEAOQtZiaoaezax-XxdKlIv0TDQ6_AJ82UsnB2V_WA).
